summary: Implemented three-tier memory monitoring: earlyoom for system OOM prevention with desktop notifications, memory-monitor user service for threshold-based alerts (80% warning, 90% critical), and claude-memory-tracker for Claude process memory logging. All services verified with nix flake check.

artifacts.summary: Added earlyoom service configuration for system-level OOM prevention with notifications
Added memory-monitor and claude-memory-tracker scripts with systemd user services
Implementation summary with verification steps and service commands

completion_data.completion_summary: Implemented three-tier memory monitoring system: earlyoom for system OOM prevention, memory-monitor service with desktop alerts at 80%/90% thresholds, and claude-memory-tracker for process-specific memory logging to CSV. All configurations verified with nix flake check.

next_steps: Run nixos-rebuild switch --flake .#<hostname> to apply changes, then verify services with systemctl status earlyoom and systemctl --user status memory-monitor
